text:
/ci1 1 ずいぶんと騒がしいじゃないか。
あたしたちも混ぜな！
行くよ、ルミア！

/ci2 1 ふう、一丁上がりだね！
久々にいい運動が出来たよ
それじゃあね！

くそ、完全になまってるな……
悪いね、先に退かせてもらうよ。

/ci1 1 なさけないね、ルミア！
少し休んでな

/ci1 1 Dang what a racket! We oughta get in on this
too! Here we go, Lumia!

/ci2 1 Phew, one more in the win column! Finally had
some good luck for a change! Alrighty then, see ya!

Damn it, I've gotten rusty... Hate to leave you
here, but we're retreating!
/ci1 1 That was pitiful, Lumia! Take a little break!
